svg.title: Reduce-side join visualisation
svg.desc: All mapper outputs for EMP01 arrive at the reducer. emp~ record provides employee info; pay~ records provide monthly payroll. Reducer joins them and tracks maxPay.
svg.text: Reduce-side join — all records share key = EMP01

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the reducer identify the employee record by its prefix?')
sendPrompt('Can there be multiple payroll records per employee in the same reducer call?')
sendPrompt('How does the reducer handle February payroll for the same employee?')
sendPrompt('How does the reducer handle March payroll for the same employee?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the PayrollReducer join steps in detail')
g.text: ① Detect prefix: emp~ or pay~
② Store emp~ fields as empName, dept
④ Emit one line per pay~ row

svg.text: Output rows emitted (one per pay~ record)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Is one output line emitted per payroll month or per employee?')
sendPrompt('Why is maxPay the same across all output lines for one employee?')
sendPrompt('How many output lines exist for an employee with 3 payroll months?')

svg.text: Missing employee (no emp~ record) → output: UNKNOWN EMPLOYEE, UNKNOWN — payroll rows still emitted
